_doc: Map of route to allowed Axe rule IDs. Allowed pairs are exempt from the serious/critical gate. Add an entry only with a justification in PR review.

_followups.color-contrast: The redesign's --faint token (#a3a19d on #ffffff ~2.5:1) is used for tertiary text (date-header detail, counts, end-of-list, 'Opens in Maps'). Approved in the Schedule redesign spec; revisit if the design tokens change.
